017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.time.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025/**
026 * Single-use, TTL-bounded store for the per-login {@code state} &rarr; {@code (nonce, codeVerifier,
027 * redirectTarget)} association created during {@link OidcRelyingParty#startLogin} and consumed during
028 * {@link OidcRelyingParty#completeLogin}.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Security properties (see OpenID Connect Core &sect;3.1.2.1 and the RP charter):
032 * <ul>
033 *    <li><b>Single-use</b> &mdash; {@link #consume(String)} atomically removes the entry, so a replayed
034 *       callback with the same {@code state} fails.
035 *    <li><b>TTL-bounded</b> &mdash; entries older than the configured TTL are treated as a miss and swept.
036 *    <li><b>Size-bounded</b> &mdash; an LRU cap (default 10 000) prevents unbounded growth from abandoned
037 *       login attempts; eviction mirrors the {@code BoundedLruTokenCache} shape.
038 * </ul>
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * Thread-safe.
042 *
043 * @since 10.0.0
044 */
045public class EphemeralStore {
046
047   /** Default maximum number of in-flight login attempts retained. */
048   public static final int DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES = 10_000;
049
050   /** Default time-to-live for a pending login (the user has at most a few minutes at the IdP). */
051   public static final Duration DEFAULT_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(5);
052
053   /** Hard cap on the configurable TTL. */
054   static final Duration MAX_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(30);
055
056   /**
057    * A pending-login association awaiting the IdP callback.
058    *
059    * @param nonce The OIDC {@code nonce} value bound into the authorization request.
060    * @param codeVerifier The PKCE {@code code_verifier} string.
061    * @param redirectTarget The application URL to redirect to after a successful login.  May be
062    *    {@code null}.
063    * @param createdAt The instant the entry was stored.
064    */
065   public record PendingLogin(String nonce, String codeVerifier, String redirectTarget, Instant createdAt) {}
066
067   private final int maxEntries;
068   private final Duration ttl;
069   private final Clock clock;
070   private final Map<String,PendingLogin> entries;
071   private final Object lock = new Object();
072
073   /**
074    * Constructor.
075    *
076    * @param ttl The single-use TTL.  Must be positive and not exceed 30 minutes.
077    * @param maxEntries The LRU size cap.  Must be positive.
078    * @param clock The clock for TTL comparisons.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
079    */
080   public EphemeralStore(Duration ttl, int maxEntries, Clock clock) {
081      assertArgNotNull("ttl", ttl);
082      assertArg(!ttl.isZero() && !ttl.isNegative(), "ttl must be positive");
083      assertArg(ttl.compareTo(MAX_TTL) <= 0, "ttl must not exceed 30 minutes (was {0})", ttl);
084      assertArg(maxEntries > 0, "maxEntries must be positive (was {0})", maxEntries);
085      this.ttl = ttl;
086      this.maxEntries = maxEntries;
087      this.clock = assertArgNotNull("clock", clock);
088      this.entries = new LinkedHashMap<>(16, 0.75f, true) {
089         private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
090         @Override
091         protected boolean removeEldestEntry(Map.Entry<String,PendingLogin> eldest) {
092            return size() > EphemeralStore.this.maxEntries;
093         }
094      };
095   }
096
097   /**
098    * Stores a pending-login association keyed by {@code state}.
099    *
100    * @param state The opaque {@code state} value.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
101    * @param nonce The OIDC {@code nonce}.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
102    * @param codeVerifier The PKCE {@code code_verifier}.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
103    * @param redirectTarget The post-login redirect target.  May be <jk>null</jk>.
104    */
105   public void store(String state, String nonce, String codeVerifier, String redirectTarget) {
106      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("state", state);
107      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("nonce", nonce);
108      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("codeVerifier", codeVerifier);
109      var now = clock.instant();
110      synchronized (lock) {
111         sweepExpired(now);
112         entries.put(state, new PendingLogin(nonce, codeVerifier, redirectTarget, now));
113      }
114   }
115
116   /**
117    * Atomically removes and returns the pending-login association for {@code state}, if present and
118    * not expired.
119    *
120    * @param state The {@code state} value from the callback.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
121    * @return The association, or {@link Optional#empty()} if absent or expired.
122    */
123   public Optional<PendingLogin> consume(String state) {
124      if (state == null)
125         return oe();
126      var now = clock.instant();
127      synchronized (lock) {
128         var p = entries.remove(state);
129         if (p == null)
130            return oe();
131         if (isExpired(p, now))
132            return oe();
133         return o(p);
134      }
135   }
136
137   /**
138    * Returns the current entry count.  Primarily for tests and metrics.
139    *
140    * @return The entry count.
141    */
142   public int size() {
143      synchronized (lock) {
144         return entries.size();
145      }
146   }
147
148   private boolean isExpired(PendingLogin p, Instant now) {
149      return !now.isBefore(p.createdAt().plus(ttl));
150   }
151
152   private void sweepExpired(Instant now) {
153      entries.values().removeIf(p -> isExpired(p, now));
154   }
155}
